title: Magnavox Odyssey 2: 1978-1984
content:
The Magnavox Odyssey 2 is an overlooked second generation game console, at least in the United States. I was curious how this console sold 2 million units and yet I never saw one and rarely heard about it growing up.

The post Magnavox Odyssey 2: 1978-1984 appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
